questions.question: Write a Java program in a class called Hello to display the message Good morning.
Write a Java program in a class called Student to display a student name, class, and age on three separate lines.
Write a Java program to declare a short variable students with value 100 and print it.
Write a Java program to declare a String variable schoolName with value Sishya and print it.
Write a Java program to print the sum, difference, product, quotient, and remainder of 10 and 3.
Write a Java program to declare int a = 100 and int b = 800 and print a + b.
Write a Java program to store your name, age, class, and section in suitable variables and print them in a single line.

Write a Java program to print the pattern shown below.
* * *
* $ *
Write a Java program to create a class named Bank, declare variables for number of customers, customer name, and account balance, and display the customer name and balance.
Write a Java program to create a class named Library, declare variables for number of books, book name, and book price, and print the book name and price.
Write a Java program to declare and initialize two integers and print their sum.
Write a Java program to declare and initialize two integers and print their difference.
Write a Java program to declare and initialize two integers and print their quotient.
Write a Java program to declare and initialize two integers and print their remainder.
Write a Java program to create an arithmetic calculator for performing +, -, *, and /.

Rohan bought 2 kg of rice at 45 per kg, 1.5 kg of sugar at 40 per kg, and 3 litres of milk at 30 per litre. The shopkeeper gave a discount of 20 on the total bill. Write a Java program to display the final amount to be paid.
